englishDefinitions: (informal) To come to understand; to discover or find a solution; to deduce.
persianTranslation: (غیررسمی) برای فهمیدن کشف یا یافتن راه حل؛ استنباط کردن
examples: As soon as I figure out what is wrong with my car, I will fix it.
We'd already figured out that the trip would cost $1,000.
